name: trace-oss
description: Unified execution tracer (Node/Chrome) — the `trace-cli` CLI + usage skill.

plugins.name: trace
plugins.description: Set breakpoints + fire a trigger → a full execution trace as one JSON envelope. Node/Chrome over CDP; plus `trace-cli serve` for a realtime trace UI. Adds the `trace-cli` binary to PATH (named `trace-cli`, not `trace`, to avoid colliding with macOS's /usr/bin/trace).
